name: Anika Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Anika Therapeutics, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on orthobiologics and regenerative solutions. Its product portfolio includes hyaluronic acid-based joint health treatments such as ORTHOVISC, MONOVISC, and CINGAL for osteoarthritis pain management, as well as surgical and regenerative products including HYALOFAST, HYALOBARRIER, TACTOSET, and INTEGRITY. The company develops and commercializes products targeting joint preservation and restoration across multiple musculoskeletal therapeutic areas.

products.name: ORTHOVISC
products.description: Hyaluronic acid-based viscosupplementation treatment for osteoarthritis joint pain.

products.name: MONOVISC
products.description: Single-injection hyaluronic acid treatment for osteoarthritis pain relief.

products.name: CINGAL
products.description: Hyaluronic acid and corticosteroid combination injection for osteoarthritis pain.

products.name: HYALOFAST
products.description: Regenerative scaffold for cartilage repair and restoration.

products.name: HYALOBARRIER
products.description: Anti-adhesion barrier product used in surgical procedures.

products.name: TACTOSET
products.description: Injectable bone void filler for orthopedic surgical applications.

products.name: INTEGRITY
products.description: Fixation product used in orthopedic and soft tissue repair procedures.

products.name: HYVISC
products.description: Hyaluronic acid-based veterinary joint treatment product.

products.name: ANIKAVISC
products.description: Hyaluronic acid-based product in Anika's viscosupplement portfolio.
